data.name: Hentai Tales: Creampie Cuckold Wife
data.detailed_description:
遊戲玩法

在破解燒腦謎題的同時享受情慾故事！
依照數字順序連接棋盤上的所有方格
每完成一道謎題即可解鎖性感新圖並推進劇情！
你能完成所有謎題並解鎖全部女孩嗎！？

故事背景

一對富裕的夫婦，怯懦的丈夫哀求我佔有他的妻子，還有她那令人無法抗拒的肉體...
如今我住進他們家中，支配著他們的婚姻，每日在她體內注入我的種子，而他只能在一旁看著，在羞恥與渴望中煎熬。

角色介紹

Emily Sato:

擁有W罩杯魔鬼身材的企業女強人。看似純真卻潛藏著不自覺的飢渴。
在我的支配下逐漸覺醒原始慾望的模樣...

遊戲特色

  • 收錄20張美少女性感撩人的精緻CG
  • 充滿幻想色彩的背德情慾故事與性格鮮明的女孩們
  • 可跳過解謎直接享受劇情 (解謎時按下Enter鍵)
  • CG鑑賞模式 (解謎後點擊CG左右按鈕切換)

data.name: Hentai Tales: Creampie Cuckold Wife
data.detailed_description:
GamePlay

Enjoy a sensual story while completing tricky puzzles!
Connect the numbers sequentially, using all of the squares on the board
After completing a puzzle, you will unlock a sexy new image and the next part of the story!
Can you complete every puzzle and meet all of the girls?!

Story Background

A wealthy couple, a timid husband begging me to take his wife, and her irresistible body...
Now I’m living under their roof, dominating their marriage, and filling her daily with my seed while he watches, aching with shame and desire.

Characters

Emily Sato:

A powerful CEO with a stunning figure and W-cup breasts. Innocent yet unconsciously eager.
she slowly awakens to raw pleasure under my control...

Features

  • 20 sexy and erotic images of beautiful girls.
  • A fantastical erotic story with girls who have unique personalities.
  • You can skip the puzzles if you just want to enjoy the story. (Press Enter during a puzzle).
  • CG Gallery mode. (Click the left and right buttons next to the CG after completing a puzzle).
